summary: Iteration 41: Frontend testing of PSPs.js syntax fix and pagination integration. All features working correctly - PSP listing page renders 3 PSP cards (uni, network, TEST PSP), clicking a card opens full-page detail view with all 4 tabs (Deposits, Withdrawals, Reserve Fund, Settlement History) rendering correctly without errors.
passed_tests: PSP listing page renders with 3 PSP cards (uni, network, TEST PSP)
Clicking a PSP card opens the full-page detail view
Deposits tab renders correctly with date filters and 'No pending settlements' message when empty
Withdrawals tab renders correctly with date filters, summary cards (Total Withdrawals, Commission, Extra Commission, Count), and 'No withdrawal transactions' message when empty
Settlement History tab renders correctly with settlement data table showing Reference, Pay Currency, Gross, Commission, Reserve Fund, Extra Charges, Net Received, Date, Status columns
Reserve Fund tab renders correctly with summary cards (Total Held, Due This Week, Released, Holding Period)
Back button returns to PSP listing page
PaginationControls component is correctly imported and used
No JavaScript console errors related to JSX syntax on the PSP page
ESLint passes with no issues on PSPs.js
critical_code_review_comments: PSPs.js lines 111-123: Pagination state variables (pspPage, depPage, wdrPage, stlPage, totalPages, totals) correctly defined
PSPs.js line 1161: PaginationControls correctly integrated for main PSP grid (shows when pspTotalPages > 1)
PSPs.js line 1477: PaginationControls correctly integrated for Deposits tab
PSPs.js lines 1608-1612: PaginationControls correctly integrated for Withdrawals tab (shows when wdrTotalPages > 1)
PSPs.js lines 1957-1961: PaginationControls correctly integrated for Settlement History tab (shows when stlTotalPages > 1)
All TabsContent components have proper closing tags - JSX syntax error has been fixed
context_for_next_testing_agent: PSPs.js syntax error has been fixed. All 4 tabs (Deposits, Withdrawals, Reserve Fund, Settlement History) render correctly. PaginationControls are integrated for all data tables and only show when totalPages > 1. The 'uni' PSP has settlement history data with 3 completed settlements. Console shows some 401/404 errors but these are unrelated to PSP functionality (likely favicon or other resources).
